generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a retired Air Force veteran, I've seen firsthand how our alliances keep America safe. The recent NATO exercises in Eastern Europe showed exactly why we can't afford to cut back on our commitments. A former Pentagon strategist I know well (who prefers to stay anonymous) told me that even small reductions in our presence could embolden adversaries. We can't risk that. #StandWithAllies
